subtasks.description: Extract Slack contract renewal data from SAM (Software Asset Management) including contract dates, renewal terms, license counts, and renewal status
Query consumption data warehouse to retrieve Slack usage trends over time including active users, license utilization rates, and usage patterns
Perform cross-reconciliation between SAM contract renewal timelines and consumption usage trends to identify correlation patterns and predict renewal trajectory
Analyze the license renewal trajectory by examining growth rates, utilization gaps, and forecasting future renewal needs based on consumption trends and contract cycles
Generate actionable insights and recommendations for Slack license renewal planning, including cost optimization opportunities and renewal timing strategy

plan.cost_rationale: Multi-stage workflow combining data extraction, query, reconciliation, and analysis. Extraction and queries use mid-tier for complex data retrieval. Cross-reconciliation uses mid-tier for sophisticated pattern matching. Analysis uses mid-tier for comprehensive forecasting. Final reporting uses small-tier for straightforward recommendation synthesis.

mongo_value.reason: upstream extract_sam_contracts returned all null fields; no contract anchor data to join against

reconciliation_notes.data_quality_issue: both upstream outputs returned null values; extract_sam_contracts produced no rows and query_consumption_data pipeline has no materialized results available in this context
reconciliation_notes.recommended_action: re-execute extract_sam_contracts with valid Slack vendor filter and confirm sam_licenses collection contains documents matching publisher=Slack with status in [active,expired,renewed]
blocked_on: no consumption pipeline result rows to join
cannot compute correlation without both sides populated

Request requires: (1) complete, validated upstream query results, (2) explicit policy registry for evaluation, (3) clarification of data access authorization scope.
